author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Both manual tests PASS. Test 1 (sentinel run + label): issue #560 created, labeled agent-todo: replicate, sentinel dispatched agent, agent ran 8m 23s in tmux, wrote test_help_section_spacing_consistent in tests/cli_integration.rs, reported 'cannot reproduce' (expected for fake issue), sentinel harvested + posted GH comment on #560 with Sentinel: Reproduction Report markdown. Test 2 (webhook): enabled webhook with HMAC secret, sent signed POST to /webhook/github → 200 queued, sentinel engine processed signal (shown in history with skipped=1 because webhook-qa-only is unknown label, as designed). Invalid signature → 401, missing signature → 401. All verified end-to-end.
